title: Channel Schema
description: This object contains information about the channel representation in Kafka.

topic.description: Kafka topic name if different from channel name.

partitions.description: Number of partitions configured on this topic.

replicas.description: Number of replicas configured on this topic.

topicConfiguration.description: Topic configuration properties that are relevant for the API.

confluent.key.schema.validation.description: It shows whether the schema validation for the message key is enabled. Vendor specific config. For more details: (https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/installation/configuration/topic-configs.html#confluent-key-schema-validation)

confluent.key.subject.name.strategy.description: The name of the schema lookup strategy for the message key. Vendor specific config. For more details: (https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/installation/configuration/topic-configs.html#confluent-key-subject-name-strategy)

confluent.value.schema.validation.description: It shows whether the schema validation for the message value is enabled. Vendor specific config. For more details: (https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/installation/configuration/topic-configs.html#confluent-value-schema-validation)

confluent.value.subject.name.strategy.description: The name of the schema lookup strategy for the message value. Vendor specific config. For more details: (https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/installation/configuration/topic-configs.html#confluent-value-subject-name-strategy)

envServerOverrides.description: A map of server name (as defined in the AsyncAPI document) to a partial channel binding object. When the named server is active, its overrides are merged onto the base channel binding.

additionalProperties.description: Partial channel binding whose fields are merged onto the base kafka channel binding when the named server is active.

topic.description: Kafka topic name if different from channel name.

partitions.description: Number of partitions configured on this topic.

replicas.description: Number of replicas configured on this topic.

bindingVersion.description: The version of this binding. If omitted, 'latest' MUST be assumed.
